title: Wout Van Aert on the Way Up, Just in Time for the Classics: ‘I Was Close to Victory’
content:
Jorgenson again impresses in Tirreno-Adriatico but just misses out on moving up to second overall.

Read the full article at Wout Van Aert on the Way Up, Just in Time for the Classics: ‘I Was Close to Victory’ on Velo.
author: sstokes
